name: Potato Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the potatoes, broccoli, celery, carrot, onion, chicken broth, and black pepper.
2. Add 1 cup water to the saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
3. Cover and simmer until the potatoes are tender (about 20 minutes).
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the flour and milk until smooth.
5. Slowly pour the flour mixture into the vegetables in the saucepan, stirring constantly.
6. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened (about 5 minutes).
7. Add the cheese spread and ham to the soup, stirring occasionally until the cheese is melted.
